name: @dj-tools/music-tagger
description: A local music library management application

scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run kill:backend && cd backend && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: pnpm run kill:frontend && cd frontend && pnpm run dev
scripts.dev:backend:tee: pnpm run kill:backend && cd backend && pnpm run dev 2>&1 | tee -a ../backend.dev.log
scripts.dev:frontend:tee: pnpm run kill:frontend && cd frontend && pnpm run dev 2>&1 | tee -a ../frontend.dev.log
scripts.install:all: echo 'Use pnpm install from repo root instead'
scripts.test:e2e:clean: pkill -f 'playwright.*test' || true; lsof -ti:3001,5173,5174,5175,5176,5177,5178,5179,5180 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf /Volumes/T7/test-music-* 2>/dev/null || true; echo '✅ E2E processes and temp files cleaned up'
scripts.test:e2e:status: echo '🔍 Checking running E2E processes:'; echo 'Playwright:'; pgrep -f 'playwright.*test' || echo '  None running'; echo 'Backend (3001):'; lsof -ti:3001 || echo '  None running'; echo 'Frontend (5173-5180):'; lsof -ti:5173,5174,5175,5176,5177,5178,5179,5180 || echo '  None running'; echo 'Temp dirs:'; ls -d /Volumes/T7/test-music-* 2>/dev/null || echo '  None found'
scripts.test:e2e:results: echo '🔗 Opening latest test results...' && (test -f frontend/e2e/reports/html-report/index.html && open frontend/e2e/reports/html-report/index.html) || (test -f playwright-report/index.html && open playwright-report/index.html) || echo '❌ No recent test reports found'
